items.title: How Musk and Altman are feuding over OpenAI’s future in court
items.summary: The documents filed by both sides on the opening day of trial tell two completely different stories — and only one can be true
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Amazon, Meta join fight to end Google Pay, PhonePe dominance in India
items.summary: PhonePe and Google Pay command 80% of India's UPI instant payments network. Rivals are set to meet with regulators to lobby for restrictions.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Elon Musk’s worst enemy in court is Elon Musk
items.summary: About five hours into Elon Musk's testimony, I typed the following sentence into my notes: "I have never been more sympathetic to Sam Altman in my life." Musk's direct testimony...
